wordplay_note: The lucky man in an unlucky world — he escapes the worst fate
card_description: Ernie Luckman (meaning "Luckman = lucky man (ironic)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Arctor's affable housemate and fellow Substance D user. Name note: The lucky man in an unlucky world — he escapes the worst fate. The good-natured friend who cannot save anyone from systemic destruction. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*.

reference.brief: Arctor's affable housemate and fellow Substance D user
reference.significance: The good-natured friend who cannot save anyone from systemic destruction
